headline: Kennedy's health officials explored US ban of some widely used antidepressants, sources say
summary: U.S. health departmentofficials last week explored whether they could ban certaindrugs in a widely prescribed class of antidepressants as HealthSecretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. prepared to roll out...
